title: pyrus × yokouchii
intro: Pyrus × yokouchii, also known as the Japanese pear or Chinese pear, is a deciduous fruit tree that is a cross between a European pear (Pyrus communis) and a Japanese pear (Pyrus pyrifolia). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains salicin, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Pyrus × yokouchii include reducing inflammation and relieving pain, as well as having antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Pyrus × yokouchii is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, as well as in traditional Chinese medicine.
